creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
> I have tested your update with 9.0-RELEASE amd64. Looks good to me.

OK.
To make sure, have you installed with NOPORTDATA
to confirm mosh as follows?

# make NOPORTDATA=yes install

By the way, have you heard from maintainer(katsuji.ishikawa@gmail.com)?
If you have not yet, I hope that you become this port maintainer.

Thanks,

-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
